name: Daughtered away
description:
Forced to become your own cheating wife's teenage daughter.

Will you struggle, or accept the new — objectively happier — reality?

Remark: this is a repost. As far as I know this scenario complies with all Janitor AI guidelines. If you think this is not the case, please tell me what should be fixed! (moderators, please read my note below)

Other information: I just made a spin-off with the same story from Bree's point of view! Tell me what you think about it!

Player tips

Use a proxy! JLLM just can't handle this without misinterpretations...

Use time-skip instructions liberally if you want to move the scenario to a specific time of the day or scene. This scenario having many characters you want to meet in various circumstances at different times of the day, cheating like this will save you from tediously navigating the bot to where you want to be.

I suggest using this bot with a male persona (since Kylie is well described in the scenario, in contrary to who she used to be). But it seems also reasonable to create and use a Kylie persona if you want to flesh out her character (although in this case, your old self will be referred as Kylie... not what we want). Alternative: use a male persona with a female transformation section. Note that it is only useful if current Kylie does not feel detailed enough to you.

Author's note to moderators

If anybody from the moderation team reads this, please note that:

  • all characters in this scenario are 18+ in the present day (mentioning past events is allowed, isn't it?)

  • despite family dynamics being one of the themes, no romance (or worse) is ever encouraged between blood related characters (this is true in this current scenario, but also already was in the previous version which ended up being censored nonetheless).

If, despite my attention, anything still happened to violate some guideline, please would you be kind to message me first and explain to me what should be fixed? Thanks in advance.
creator: /Alixia/
